description: Per-name short-squeeze FUEL gauge from 100% free authoritative data: FINRA consolidated short interest (official bi-monthly) + SEC fails-to-deliver + daily short-volume (finra-short.json) + FMP float/price. Transparent 0-100 squeeze-fuel score (crowding/exit-difficulty/building/ftd/ignition). top_picks -> signal-harvester for measure-before-trust grading; NOT wired into decision engines until alpha-proven.

schedule.description: Daily 13:30 UTC Tue-Sat — after finra-short daily refresh; picks up new bi-monthly SI + semi-monthly FTD as they publish
